GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Samsung is giving you the chance to win the Galaxy S20 Ultra", "All you have to do is keep your eyes peeled.", "In celebration of the hotly-anticipated launch of the Galaxy S20 range, Samsung Australia has introduced one of its largest ever consumer giveaways, coined Microcodes. The nation-wide campaign sees Samsung Australia give away hundreds of thousands of dollars' worth of Galaxy S20 Ultra smartphones, and is a scavenger hunt you're going to want to take part in. To win, you'll need to spot the codes – the word 'phone' – hidden in Samsung Galaxy S20 Ultra advertisements online and on Samsung social channels. The trick? The codes are very small, so you'll need to pay attention. On top of that, not every code is a winner. Samsung is dropping hints on its social channels, so for the inside scoop, keep your eyes on Samsung's Facebook, Instagram and Twitter and you might just be the first to discover a winning code. The newly unveiled Galaxy S20 Ultra is one of Samsung's most impressive and innovative iterations of the smartphone. Offering unprecedented 5G connectivity, a new Single Take feature which lets you capture a special moment in multiple ways, an 108MP camera boasting AI technologies and the exciting feature that is 100x Space Zoom, the device is one you're going to want to win. "Microcodes is our most exciting consumer campaign and a first for Samsung Australia," explains Garry McGregor, vice president of IT and Mobile at Samsung Electronics Australia. "The concept is clever, fun and speaks to one of our most standout camera features, the 100x Space Zoom." "To date, Galaxy S20 Ultra has been reviewed by Australian journalists around the country with the highest of praise for its camera, performance and overall experience," adds McGregor. "For such a coveted device, we expect the Microcodes campaign will be hugely popular and we wish all Australians the best of luck." To take part in the competition, and try your luck at winning the Samsung Galaxy S20 Ultra, you'll have to be the first to find a winning code cleverly hidden within Galaxy S20 advertisements online and on Samsung Australia social channels. In an effort to give you a head start, Samsung is providing you with your very first one: phoNe3078. Once you've discovered the code, head to the Samsung Microcodes microsite here, and enter it to find out if you were the first to spot that code. If you're struggling to find the codes, be sure to follow the likes of photographer Demas Rusli and YouTube stars Mr Muselk and Unlisted Leaf, as they will also be dropping hints on their social channels. Best of luck!"
